description: Randomized multi-bank mule-chain fraud scenario generated on each reset/inject. Account IDs, amounts, timestamps, bank assignments, and device clustering all vary per execution. The graph topology (victim → primary mule → branches → layers → predicted hops) is preserved to ensure ML models and the 10-flag rule engine receive realistic, structurally valid inputs.
topology: VICTIM → PRIMARY_MULE → BRANCH_A + BRANCH_B → LAYER_A1 + LAYER_A2 + LAYER_B1 + LAYER_B2 → TAIL → SINK + PREDICTED_HOPS
